DISCOVERY, 302, PLAINTIFF JACOB BRADEN TO COMPEL DEFENDANT BARCADEE DELIVERY & WAREHOUSING, INC.'S RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY AND MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET. NO. ONE; SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION SET ONE WITHOUT OBJECTIONS; WITHIN 10 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THE ORDER. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS TO PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $560.00 BY DECEMBER 12, 2015. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DENNIS HYDE, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Barcadee Delivery & Warehousing, Inc.?S Responses To Written Discovery; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-12-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DAVID J. STREZA, ESQ. of Vogl Meredith Burke LLP, Tel No. 415-398-0200 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. DANIEL L. MCCRARY, ESQ. of the Law Office of Beverly E. Narayan, Tel No. 415-227-2323 appearing telephonically for Defendants Barcadee DEliver & Warehousing, Inc.;
Atty. TIFFANY L. STEWARD, ESQ. of Farmer Case & Fedor, Tel No. 619-338-0300 appearing telephonically for Defendant Manuel Estrella dba Estrella Trucking;
Atty. KELSEY M. DANIEL, ESQ. of Siegel, Moreno & Stettler, Tel No. 619-525-7626 appearing telephonically for Intervenor Applied Risk Services, Inc.

All parties stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court modifies its tentative ruling and orders as follows: Plaintiff Jacob Braden to compel Defendant Barcadee Delivery & Warehousing, Inc.'s responses to written discovery and monetary sanctions is granted. Defendant shall provide Responses to Form Interrogatories, Set. No. One; Special Interrogatories, Set One; and Requests for Production Set One without objections; within 10 days of service of the order. Defendant shall pay monetary sanctions to Plaintiff in the amount of $560.00 by December 12, 2015. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Dennis Hyde, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
